details.copilot_response_summary: Copilot warned user not to share SSN, provided security advice. Full normal response — no APF interception.

comparison_with_previous.path_patterns_change: Prefix matching /github/chat/ applied but still no interception
comparison_with_previous.possible_cause: API may use different domain (e.g., api.github.com, copilot-proxy.githubusercontent.com) not in VT SNI list, or actual endpoint path differs from expected

recommendation: Capture HAR from DevTools Network tab to identify exact API domain and path used by GitHub Copilot chat. The API endpoint may not go through github.com domain at all.
